title: Seperate notification setting for annotations in files
excerpt:
Hello there, 
if I upload a PDF (or JPEG or a differnt type of file) in the file column of my item and my fellow collegue adds 15 annotations to the PDF, each annotation creates an update, for which I receive a notificat…

posts.author: Sven (Sven Kaufmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

if I upload a PDF (or JPEG or a differnt type of file) in the file column of my item and my fellow collegue adds 15 annotations to the PDF, each annotation creates an update, for which I receive a notification. This would be 15 notifications then.

If I turn off the notifications for updates, I do not receive any notifications regarding upgrades any more at all. So this is no option.

I would absolutley love to turn off the notifications just for annotations in files.
This could be a seperate position in the notofication settings, something like this:

Annotation722×549 104 KB

I’d be happy If you consider this function.

Thank you.

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also get a notification for evey file that i upload, i would like to be able to turn that off

This is frustrating and basic. Every type of notification should have a toggle.
